sections.paragraph: βδέλυγμα, ατος, τό [βδελύσσομαι, cp. βδελυρός ‘disgusting, abominable’] in NT always of something highly offensive to God and devout believers detestable/abhorrent thing, abomination Lk 16:15; Rv 17:4f, 21:27; τὸ β. τῆς ἐρημώσεως the detestable thing causing desolation, desolating defilement Mt 24:15; Mk 13:14.
